deception_tactics.alpha: Overstate commitment to Exploration-Priority mission_objective early to anchor on a high-value objective, then trade mission focus for a Government-Heavy funding_split later.
deception_tactics.beta: Emphasize preference for hardware_lead as Joint-Build to appear flexible on mission_objective, positioning to leverage funding_split concessions from Alpha and Gamma.
deception_tactics.gamma: Open strongly for Commercial-Tech-Demo mission_objective to signal priority, but remain flexible on hardware_lead to negotiate for funding_split closer to Equal-Thirds or Government-Heavy.

issues.description: Primary purpose of the joint mission.
issues.name: mission_objective

issues.description: Which agency leads design and integration of the primary spacecraft.
issues.name: hardware_lead

issues.description: How the mission's total cost is divided across the three agencies.
issues.name: funding_split

logrolling: Alpha can concede on hardware_lead by supporting Joint-Build or Gamma-Lead in exchange for Beta or Gamma agreeing to a Government-Heavy funding_split, which Alpha strongly prefers.
Beta can trade support for Exploration-Priority mission_objective to Alpha in exchange for Alpha accepting a Commercial-Heavy funding_split that Beta prefers.
Gamma can offer to lead hardware_lead with Joint-Build, which it prefers, if Alpha supports Commercial-Tech-Demo mission_objective that Gamma values more than Alpha does.
Alpha's preference for Exploration-Priority mission_objective can be traded to Beta for Beta's support on Government-Heavy funding_split, benefiting Alpha's funding priorities.
Beta's support for Equal-Thirds funding_split can be exchanged with Gamma's concession to favor Science-Priority mission_objective, benefiting Beta's consistent moderate scoring across objectives.
